subject: [PATCH v2 05/21] fuse: prepare for long lived reference on backing file

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch prepares the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) code to support a long-lived reference to the backing file of an inode, which will be used for passthrough operations and detached when the inode is evicted. The changes include modifications to the fuse_i.h header file, the inode.c file, and the iomode.c file to accommodate this new feature. This patch is part of a larger series of patches that aim to improve the FUSE code's handling of backing files.
